final:
module top_module(
    input [3:0] in0,
    input [3:0] in1,
    input [3:0] in2,
    input [3:0] in3,
    input [1:0] sel,
    input obf_en,
    output reg [3:0] out
);always @(*) begin
    if (obf_en == 0) begin
        out = 4'b0;
    end else begin
        case (sel)
            2'b00: out = in0;
            2'b01: out = in1;
            2'b10: out = in2;
            2'b11: out = in3;
        endcase
    end
end

endmodule
